headline: Is Capital One Financial Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
summary: Although Capital One Financial has underperformed the Nasdaq recently, analysts remain highly optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

raw.headline: Is Capital One Financial Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?

headline: Jefferies Shares Slip as Western Alliance Files $126M Loan Lawsuit
summary: JEF shares tumble after Western Alliance files a lawsuit over a $126.4M loan tied to bankrupt auto-parts distributor First Brands, alleging breach of contract and fraud.

raw.headline: Jefferies Shares Slip as Western Alliance Files $126M Loan Lawsuit
raw.summary: JEF shares tumble after Western Alliance files a lawsuit over a $126.4M loan tied to bankrupt auto-parts distributor First Brands, alleging breach of contract and fraud.

headline: Amid market tumult, Nexstar Media launches $2.75B leveraged loan backing Tegna buy
summary: Nexstar Media Group is out with a proposed $2.75 billion term loan B to finance its proposed acquisition of Tegna, according to sources. A lender call was held on the morning of March 9, and commitments to the BofA Securities–led deal are due Wednesday, March 18. Price talk for the seven-year TLB is S+275-300 with a 99 OID. At talk, the yield to maturity is around 6.77-7.04%. Lenders are offered six months of 101 soft call protection. There is no ticking fee for 60 days, and then the fee is 50%
